items.title: [正面] Very good game. One of the only gacha which I wann...
items.summary: Very good game. One of the only gacha which I wanna continue playing. Great storytelling, great gameplay which requires thinking and calculations. Hope the game gets better and better, and gets more player. The number of players now is definitely not what this game deserves. Fighting.

items.title: [负面] Los gráficos son uno de los puntos fuertes del jue...
items.summary: Los gráficos son uno de los puntos fuertes del juego. Sin embargo, la historia y la jugabilidad dejan bastante que desear. Apenas unos minutos después de empezar, el juego te introduce en combate sin explicar adecuadamente las mecánicas básicas, lo que puede resultar confuso para jugadores nuevos. Además, la narrativa del prólogo y del acto 1 no logra captar mi interés, por lo que la experiencia inicial termina siendo poco atractiva.

items.title: [正面] The mechanics are fun and fine if you like card bu...
items.summary: The mechanics are fun and fine if you like card builders (decks based on characters, cards themselves are not interchangeable) and turn based fighting like slay the spire. The best part of it so far though is the story. I am not a huge fan of horror( i hate horror) but this games over arching story and arcs themselves are SO GOOD i wont say that if your looking for strange reactions or responses sometimes that you wont find them but to say you hate at least any of the first 4 chapters story then im sorry your just playing the game to not like it. What really made me fall in love with this game is the scene that plays after you take a long break. Thankyou so much Brain In A Vat. that scene was beautiful and so in character for this dark and twisted world you have created. I plan to make this my gacha game for as long as you are willing to keep the game alive.

items.title: [正面] Anime, Lovecraft, Slay the Spire and a generous ga...
items.summary: Anime, Lovecraft, Slay the Spire and a generous gacha, it scores really decently for me :)

items.title: [正面] Im just starting and im completely in love with th...
items.summary:
Im just starting and im completely in love with this game. 
Art style is peak.
Music is peak.
Story is depressing and nihilistic = peak.
its a gacha game that doesnt feel like its predatory and its gifting you so much stuff to pull characters, its unreal. 
10/10 <3

items.title: [正面] Знаете, в отличии от других гача-игр в эту можно з...
items.summary: Знаете, в отличии от других гача-игр в эту можно залипнуть. Она в целом неплохая, но рекомендую всё таки играть на английском (перевод очень плох и меняется от обновы к обнове). Кому нравится карточный геймплей и гача элементы пойдёт, остальным не очень.

items.title:
[正面] At first I was skeptical about this game.
I entere...
items.summary:
At first I was skeptical about this game.
I entered with expectation it was another cashgrab gacha game.

I was wrong, the game was much better than what I initially expect. Although the bad side of gacha exist (like Fomo schemes, 2 types monthly subscription, etc), it is not something that the game really focus on.
Most of the gaming experience can be enjoyed even without being dolphin or whales, the fomo on characters is not as bad as in other gacha game.

Combat Gameplay:
I think this is the meat of the game, you can spend lots of time just thinking of the team setups.
Game is not exactly easy and each turn you keep thinking how to do the best with what you have. 
The shiny new units are definitely strong, but it's not exactly straightforward, and even with shiny newer units bad team setups won't win you the game.

Ironically, there are not many team building guides (although, their Discord is cooperative when asked for help), and this is surprisingly beneficial for the game. As players like me will often decide to go blind when tackling the stages instead of looking at guides, and crafting our own team, which is fun.

Story:
It is good, and definitely not whatever-written.
While it is not an award winning story, it is definitely an enjoyment to read (Many other gacha games, even the mainstream one, I just skip their awful story).

Daily activity:
Very Light (about 5~10 min), if you don't want to play daily, it is fine skipping some of the daily rewards.
The weekly is more important. However, daily gives you currency that unlocks side stories or past events, so newer players might wwant many of those form dailies.

Others:
There are many of the dev touch that made me appreciate the game, underappreciated little stuff that people easily missed, things that even if the devs did not do it it will still be ok, yet they still do it.
These are usually the case if the some members of the devs are passionate of their own game, something that devs that only interested in $ will never do.

Weakness:
The 16 dupes is actually glaring issue for those that don't know much about this game.

Text describing skills and effects could be better, more concise and readable.

Sometimes, the power level goes far out of control, not in a good way, because most of it come from unnecessary complexities from certain character kits. So the teambuilding ceiling is (uncontrolled) awfully high, the difference between the bottom and top team is simply insane.
